vulnerabilities.title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect
vulnerabilities.name: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute remote code or directly impact confidential data and critical systems.
vulnerabilities.short_description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute remote...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Windows
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Windows Protection Mechanism Failure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Windows Shell contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Windows Shell contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
